---
title: "Firstname Lastname"
subtitle: "Master's Intern"
image: ../../resources/images/members/Placeholder.png
description: "**Dates:** Jan 2025 - June 2025 <br> Project: Hydrogel Mechanics"
about:
  id: hero-heading
  template: solana
  image-width: 20em
  image-shape: rounded
  links:
    - text: "{{< iconify fa-brands:orcid >}} ORCID"
      href: https://orcid.org/0000-0000-0000-0000
    - text: "{{< iconify fa6-brands:google-scholar >}} Scholar"
      href: https://scholar.google.com/...
    - icon: globe
      text: Personal Website
      href: https://www.personalwebsite.com
    - icon: github
      text: Github
      href: https://github.com/username
    - icon: envelope
      text: Email
      href: mailto:name@institute.edu
---


:::{#hero-heading}
:::

Summary of the internship project, university affiliation, and background...

<script type="application/javascript" src="../../resources/pages_style/custom_hal.js"></script>
<script type="application/javascript" src="../../resources/pages_style/carousel.js"></script>
